title: Comment from Rocha, David, HHS-ONC-2025-0005, HHS-ONC-2025-0005-0001, 2025-23896
comment_text:
Future consideration should be given to adopt more FHIR IGs into future rulemaking, including:
•HL7 Laboratory Reporting FHIR IG
•Medicolegal Death Investigation FHIR IG
•Physical Activity FHIR IG
•Structured Data Capture FHIR IG
•Genomics Reporting FHIR IG

HL7 Laboratory Report FHIR IG
https://build.fhir.org/ig/HL7/uv-lab-rep-ig/
Medicolegal Death Investigation FHIR IG
https://hl7.org/fhir/us/mdi/
this will be helpful for FHIR-ized death certificates
US Physical Activity IG 
https://build.fhir.org/ig/HL7/physical-activity/
Structured Data Capture FHIR IG
https://hl7.org/fhir/uv/sdc/
Genomics Reporting FHIR IG 
https://hl7.org/fhir/uv/genomics-reporting/
